description: Style NoteThis kurti from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the sober patterns with a bright colour pop denims or an intricate stole. We recommend ethnic flats in metallic tones for your feet.Product DetailsCocoa brown kurti, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, has zari work at the yoke, three quarter sleeves and side slitsMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
